title: Unlimited AI tokens aren't unlimited after all as US Army burns through supply
summary: According to the Army’s website , Ask Sage was used to complete tasks like “reclassifying personnel descriptions, which involves defining and aligning job duties, experience and backgrounds.” The Army employee says that the Army has been pushing its workers to lean into…
